project.name: Chimoney SDK Challenge
project.description: SDK implementations for the Chimoney API — a fintech platform enabling bulk global payments, payouts, and financial transactions for AI agents and humans

nodes.name: Account Management
nodes.summary: Handles transaction queries, transfers between accounts, public profile retrieval, unpaid transaction management, and Interledger wallet address issuance. Core domain for tracking financial activity.

businessRules: Transfers require valid receiver ID and positive value
Unpaid transactions can be deleted by chiRef

nodes.name: Payment Processing
nodes.summary: Manages payment initiation with payer details, payment verification, and staging-only simulation endpoints. Handles the complete payment lifecycle from creation to confirmation.

businessRules: Payments require payer email and redirect URL
Verification uses issueID
Simulation endpoints only work in staging/sandbox

nodes.name: Payouts
nodes.summary: Manages bulk payouts across multiple channels: airtime, bank transfer, mobile money, gift cards, crypto, Chimoney wallet, Interac, SPEI, Interledger, and Canadian bill payments. Supports batch operations with notification controls.

businessRules: Payouts require sub-account specification
Each channel has its own validation rules
Status can be checked via chiRef
crossDomainInteractions: Info domain for bank/mobile code lookups

nodes.name: Redemption
nodes.summary: Enables recipients to redeem Chimoney transactions as airtime, gift cards, mobile money, or custom redemption. Converts Chimoney value into tangible outcomes.

businessRules: Requires valid chiRef
Each redeem type has specific required fields (phone, email, country)

nodes.name: Financial Information
nodes.summary: Lookup services for supported countries, banks, bank branches, currency conversion, mobile money codes, assets, exchange rates, beneficiary rules, identification types, fee estimation, and bank account verification.

businessRules: Bank codes are country-specific
Currency conversion rates are time-sensitive
Bank verification validates account ownership
crossDomainInteractions: Supports all transaction domains with reference data
Payouts depend on bank/mobile code lookups

nodes.name: Sub-Account Management
nodes.summary: Multi-tenant account isolation. Create, update, delete sub-accounts; manage communities and members; handle KYC verification links. Enables hierarchical account structures.

businessRules: Sub-accounts belong to a parent account
Each sub-account has independent wallets
KYC verification is per-sub-account

nodes.name: Agent Management
nodes.summary: AI agent account lifecycle: create agent accounts with APort passports and multicurrency wallets, manage API keys, set spending policies/capabilities/regions, fund wallets, suspend/reactivate agents. Purpose-built for the Agentic Internet.

businessRules: Agents get APort passport with DID and verifiable credentials
Policies enforce spending limits and allowlists in <200ms
Each agent has one API key at a time

nodes.name: Multi-Currency Wallets
nodes.summary: Create and manage wallets supporting USD, CAD, NGN and 20+ stablecoins across 5 blockchains. Transfer between wallets, get quotes, issue wallets and bank accounts to sub-accounts. Interledger wallet addresses for cross-chain payments.

businessRules: Wallets support multiple currencies
Transfers generate exchange rate quotes
Interledger addresses follow $ilp.chimoney.io/username pattern

nodes.name: Passport
nodes.summary: APort digital passport management for AI agents and users. W3C Decentralized Identifiers (DIDs), verifiable credentials, L4 assurance level backed by KYC and regulatory licenses.

businessRules: L4 is the highest identity assurance level
KYC-anchored: parent account KYC elevates agents
Passports are cryptographically secure

nodes.name: AI Services
nodes.summary: AI-powered features for the Chimoney platform. Currently provides invoice data generation from natural language instructions.

businessRules: Invoice generation requires instruction text

nodes.name: Beneficiary Management
nodes.summary: Manage payment beneficiaries: get beneficiaries for an account, create bank beneficiaries, preview transfers with exchange rates and fees. Supports PIX and other payment methods.

businessRules: Beneficiaries are linked to accounts
Preview shows exchange rate and fees before execution

edges.description: Uses bank and currency lookup services for transfers
Creates transactions tracked by account domain
Payouts create transactions in account domain
Redeems reference transactions from account domain
Sub-accounts receive wallets and bank accounts
Agents receive APort passports on creation
Agent wallets funded from parent wallets
Uses exchange rates for multi-currency transfers
Uses bank code lookups and validation rules
Beneficiaries are targets for payout transfers
Passports issued to agents for identity verification
